texto: It is our responsibility to keep telling these tales--to tell them in a way that they teach and entertain and give meaning to our lives,' he [Jim] said later. 'This is not merely an obligation, it's something we must do because we love doing it.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Brian Jay Jones sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “It is our responsibility to keep telling these tales--to tell them in a way that they teach and e…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, creativity, fairy-tales, útil em momentos de fairy-tales.

frase_original: It is our responsibility to keep telling these tales--to tell them in a way that they teach and entertain and give meaning to our lives,' he [Jim] said later. 'This is not merely an obligation, it's something we must do because we love doing it.
